creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please consider using git for generating patches and at least add DEVELOPER=yes while testing your port. Poudriere is however recommended if possible.

https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#quick-porting
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#porting-testing

Thanks for your contribution,

Best regards,
Daniel
